title: MyOrSomeone's Enchanted Books
description: Complete visual overhaul for enchanted books — every enchantment and level uniquely detailed.
body:
### 🧩 Compatibility Should work with any version of Minecraft 1.21+ (no mods required).



### ✨ Overview This resource pack gives **each enchanted book** a unique and visually consistent texture — every **enchantment** and **level** is designed and all in the **Minecraft 16×16 style**. No more identical purple books — now you can instantly recognize your enchantments at a glance.
### 📚 Features
- Fully custom textures for **all enchantments and their levels** - Faithful to **vanilla Minecraft aesthetics** - Works seamlessly with shaders and GUI mods (no emmisive for now, maybe in the future)
### 🧾 Preview
Spoiler ![template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7d404ec449898ffe6ef1e5ccd52c023ab05cafd.png)

✨ Clean. Consistent. Recognizable. ✨
By MyOrSomeone




It's is my first ever project hopefully I'll do other in the future. Love you all !!
